name: Lowepro Protactic BP 350 AW II
description: The ProTactic BP 350 AW II Camera and Laptop Backpack from Lowepro is spacious and sturdy yet lightweight. It accommodates two DSLRs.

features.Key Features :: Holds Two Standard DSLRs & Eight Lenses | Customizable Interior Divider System | Four Access Points | ActivZone System Supports Back/Shoulders | Removable Waist Belt | Waist Belt Doubles as a Utility Belt | Sustainably Made with Recycled Fabric | Ventilated Back Panel | Externally Carry a Tripod or Monopod | All-Weather Cover
features.What's in The Box :: Lowepro ProTactic BP 350 AW II Camera and Laptop Backpack (Black, 16L) | Removable Utility Waist Belt | Smartphone Pouch | Bottle Holder | Quick Strap and Tripod Cup | All-Weather Cover
